# comfyui_prompt_artifact (Resource)

Materializes Terraform-owned ComfyUI prompt JSON to a file on disk.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `content_json` (String) Exact ComfyUI prompt JSON to persist.
- `path` (String) File path where the prompt JSON should be written.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Managed artifact identifier, equal to the absolute file path.
- `sha256` (String) SHA-256 hash of the persisted prompt JSON.
